dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你是高材生，这种‘简单’的小事应该难不倒你吧？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, you're the smart one here. A "simple" task like this should be easy for you, right?

dialogues.dialogue: 想当年我一个人单挑整个项目时，你们还在学校呢。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Back when I was running a whole project solo, you guys were still in school.

dialogues.dialogue: 不是我吹，要是没我在这坐镇，这摊子早散了。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Not to brag, but without me holding things down, this place would've fallen apart ages ago.

dialogues.dialogue: 我这人最大的缺点就是太负责，凡事非要追求极致。
dialogues.dialogue_en: My biggest flaw? I care too much and always push everything to perfection.

dialogues.dialogue: 我昨晚又为了部门的前途失眠了，这就是格局吧。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I couldn't sleep again last night, worrying about this team's future. That's what big-picture thinking looks like.

dialogues.dialogue: 老板之所以看重我，就是因为我总能看到你们看不见的高度。
dialogues.dialogue_en: The boss values me because I can see levels you guys can't even see yet.

dialogues.dialogue: 其实我有无数个跳槽的机会，留下来纯粹是为了带你们。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Honestly, I've had tons of chances to leave. I stayed just to mentor you all.

dialogues.dialogue: 哪怕我只发挥三成实力，也足够解决目前所有的麻烦。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Even at 30% of my power, I can still solve all the problems we have right now.

dialogues.dialogue: 在这个行业里，谁不得给我三分薄面？这就是积累。
dialogues.dialogue_en: In this industry, everyone gives me some respect. That's what years of reputation get you.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你今晚有急事吗？没有的话咱们一起把这点活收个尾？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, got anything urgent tonight? If not, let's wrap this up together.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你是不是还没成家？那正好，帮有家室的同事分担点？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, you're not married yet, right? Perfect - can you help cover for coworkers with families?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},现在是关键时期，你能不能克服一下个人困难，熬一下？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, this is a critical phase. Can you put your personal stuff aside and push through?

dialogues.dialogue: 现在的年轻人太计较回报，要先看你付出了什么。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Young people these days care too much about returns. First ask yourself what you've contributed.

dialogues.dialogue: 我们要做的不是产品，而是一种改变世界的信仰。
dialogues.dialogue_en: We're not just building a product - we're building a belief that can change the world.

dialogues.dialogue: 我认为，未来的行业标准将由我们今天来定义。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I believe the standards of this industry tomorrow will be defined by what we do today.

dialogues.dialogue: 有时候，我站得太高，确实难免会感到一丝孤独。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Sometimes I stand so high that yeah, it gets a little lonely up here.

dialogues.dialogue: 现在的年轻人太计较回报，要先看你付出了什么。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Young people these days care too much about returns. First ask yourself what you've contributed.

dialogues.dialogue: 虽然没有加班费，但公司给了你展示的舞台。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Sure, there's no overtime pay, but the company gave you a stage to prove yourself.

dialogues.dialogue: 这些年轻人，还是缺乏我当年的那股狼性。
dialogues.dialogue_en: These young folks still don't have that killer instinct we had back in my day.

dialogues.dialogue: 有时候，我的一个念头就能决定行业的生死。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Sometimes one idea from me can decide whether an entire industry lives or dies.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},周末有安排吗？有个挺关键的事，我想来想去只有你能办好。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, got plans this weekend? There's something important, and honestly you're the only one I trust to handle it.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你周六是在家休息，还是打算去哪儿逛逛？刚好有个小活儿……
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, chilling at home Saturday or heading out? I just happen to have a small task...

dialogues.dialogue: 我周末也会在线，你要是碰到什么问题，随时跟我同步。”
dialogues.dialogue_en: I'll be online this weekend too. If anything comes up, just keep me posted anytime.

dialogues.dialogue: 这周末大家辛苦下，这也是为了你们的个人成长。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Let's all put in some effort this weekend. It's for your personal growth too.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},在这个赛道，你不拼命，后面有的是人想拼。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, in this game, if you don't grind, plenty of people behind you will.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你这个岗位的替代性很高，要学会感恩平台。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, your role is highly replaceable. Learn to appreciate the platform you're on.

dialogues.dialogue: 现在的年轻人真幸福，像我们当年哪敢准点下班啊。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Young people today have it good. Back in our day, leaving on time wasn't even an option.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},我这有个项目收尾的活，你细心，帮我最后校对一遍？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, I've got some project wrap-up work. You're detail-oriented - can you do one final proofread for me?

dialogues.dialogue: 我打算跟领导提个新方案，你帮我写个可行性报告呗？
dialogues.dialogue_en: I'm pitching a new plan to leadership. Can you help me write the feasibility report?

dialogues.dialogue: 我明天请假，我那几个客户的咨询你顺便帮接一下？
dialogues.dialogue_en: I'm taking leave tomorrow. Can you cover client inquiries for me?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，帮我分担点周报的PPT美化，你审美最好了。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, can you help polish the weekly report slides? You've got the best taste.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你每天走这么准时，看来你的工作量还是不太饱和吧？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, you leave right on time every day. Guess your workload still isn't heavy enough, huh?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你这思路不行，跟我比起来还是太嫩了，重写吧！
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, this approach doesn't work. You're still too green compared to me - rewrite it.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},我这可是为了你好才跟你说这些，别不识好歹。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, I'm saying this for your own good. Don't be ungrateful.

dialogues.dialogue: 这活儿反正你也没做完，干脆加点班把我的也做了？
dialogues.dialogue_en: You haven't finished your own tasks anyway, so why not stay late and do mine too?

dialogues.dialogue: 你怎么这么开不起玩笑？大家平时都这么说你的。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Why are you so sensitive? Everyone jokes about you like this.

dialogues.dialogue: 能帮我是你的福气，多少人想插手我这个项目还没机会呢。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Helping me is your lucky break. Plenty of people want in on my project and don't get the chance.

dialogues.dialogue: 这种功劳谁领都一样，大家是一个团队的，你别太计较。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Who gets the credit doesn't matter - we're one team, don't be so picky.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},我看你挺闲的，帮我取个外卖不过分吧？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, you seem pretty free. Grabbing my takeout isn't too much to ask, right?

dialogues.dialogue: 老板刚才跟我夸你了，我说都是我教得好，你不介意吧？
dialogues.dialogue_en: The boss praised you just now. I told him it's because I trained you well - you don't mind, right?

dialogues.dialogue: 大家都这么熟了，透个底，你上个月绩效奖拿了多少？
dialogues.dialogue_en: We're all close here, so spill - how much was your performance bonus last month?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你这身行头不便宜吧？看来你工资挺高啊。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, that outfit ain't cheap. Looks like you're making good money.

dialogues.dialogue: 我年终奖才发了这么点，{playerName},你肯定比我多吧？毕竟你是红人。
dialogues.dialogue_en: My year-end bonus was tiny. {playerName}, you definitely got more than me, right? You're the favorite after all.

dialogues.dialogue: 咱们部门谁的工资最高？我猜是你，毕竟你天天跟领导走得近。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Who gets paid the most in our department? My guess is you, since you're always close to management.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},你天天这么晚回家，你对象就没意见？是不是感情出问题了？
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, you go home this late every day - your partner doesn't complain? Trouble in paradise?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},明天大家一起请假抗议新规，你也得签个名啊。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, we're all taking leave tomorrow to protest the new policy. You gotta sign too.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName},这事儿咱们先做了再说，不用事事都跟上面报备。
dialogues.dialogue_en: {playerName}, let's just do it first and talk later. No need to report everything upstairs.

dialogues.dialogue: 原本好好的，怎么一交到你手里就出这么多问题？
dialogues.dialogue_en: Everything was fine before - how did it become such a mess once it got to you?

dialogues.dialogue: 这些数据都是你给我的，结果错了当然得你负责。
dialogues.dialogue_en: You gave me all this data. If it's wrong, that's on you.

dialogues.dialogue: 我只是帮忙打杂，核心逻辑都是你定的，别赖我。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I was just helping out with misc stuff. You set all the core logic - don't pin this on me.

dialogues.dialogue: 这种细节你自己不把关，现在出篓子了找我有什么用？
dialogues.dialogue_en: You didn't check the details yourself. Now that it blew up, what do you want from me?

dialogues.dialogue: 这部分不是一直归你管吗？出事了怎么找我？
dialogues.dialogue_en: Hasn't this part always been your responsibility? Why are you coming to me now?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，拉你进个小群，咱们私下吐槽，绝对没领导。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I'll add you to a small private chat so we can vent. No managers in there, promise.

dialogues.dialogue: 这方案咱们直接发大老板，省得经理又抢功劳。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Let's send this plan straight to the big boss so the manager can't steal the credit again.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，你权限高，帮我下个客户名单，我这儿打不开。
dialogues.dialogue_en: You have higher access - can you pull the client list for me? I can't open it here.

dialogues.dialogue: 听说隔壁组老王和前台那谁……你见过他们吗？
dialogues.dialogue_en: Heard Old Wang from the next team and that front-desk person are a thing... have you seen them?

dialogues.dialogue: 这项目咱俩私下接了，挂我朋友公司，分你一半。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Let's take this project privately under my friend's company and split it fifty-fifty.

dialogues.dialogue: 你住的那个地段房租挺贵吧，是不是家里给补贴，还是有别的副业？
dialogues.dialogue_en: Rent where you live is pretty high, right? Family helping out, or do you have a side hustle?

dialogues.dialogue: 我看你手机屏保那个合影，那是你前任吧？长得挺眼熟啊。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I saw that photo on your lock screen - that's your ex, right? Looks kinda familiar.

dialogues.dialogue: 大家都在传你和隔壁组老王的事，你跟我说说呗？
dialogues.dialogue_en: People are all talking about you and Old Wang from the next team. Come on, tell me what happened.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，你这个年纪还不结婚，是不是要求太高？
dialogues.dialogue_en: You're still not married at your age? Are your standards too high?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，你刚才在茶水间哭什么呢？跟大伙说说，让我们安慰一下。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Why were you crying in the pantry just now? Tell everyone so we can comfort you.

dialogues.dialogue: 别处我不敢说，但在财务这块，我的话就是圣旨。
dialogues.dialogue_en: I can't speak for other teams, but in finance, what I say is final.

dialogues.dialogue: 多少高管想在我这儿插队报销，最后都得乖乖排队。
dialogues.dialogue_en: So many executives try to cut the reimbursement line with me, and every single one ends up waiting their turn.

dialogues.dialogue: 外面多少猎头想挖我，我留这儿是给老板面子。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Headhunters are always trying to poach me. I'm only staying here out of respect for the boss.

dialogues.dialogue: 审计局来人都得客客气气，你那点小事急什么？
dialogues.dialogue_en: Even people from the audit bureau are polite with me. Why are you panicking over such a small thing?

dialogues.dialogue: 合同还没过审，你现在签就是非法违规。
dialogues.dialogue_en: The contract hasn't passed review yet. Signing now would be a legal violation.

dialogues.dialogue: 急有用吗？法律风险评估至少需要三个工作日。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Rushing won't help. Legal risk assessment takes at least three business days.

dialogues.dialogue: 流程要是能随口略过，还要法务部做什么？
dialogues.dialogue_en: If we could just skip process by saying so, why would the legal team even exist?

dialogues.dialogue: 这份协议漏洞百出，拿回去重写，别浪费我时间。
dialogues.dialogue_en: This agreement is full of holes. Take it back, rewrite it, and don't waste my time.

dialogues.dialogue: 按流程提交系统，我这里不接受任何私下委托。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Submit it through the system properly. I don't take any off-the-record requests.

dialogues.dialogue: 评估没过就是没过，找谁说情法律条文也不会变。
dialogues.dialogue_en: Failed assessment means failed assessment. No amount of pleading changes the law.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，你效率高，这几页PPT顺手帮我做了吧？
dialogues.dialogue_en: You're fast - can you quickly handle these few PPT pages for me?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，这块业务逻辑你最懂，你替我写吧，肯定比我写得好。
dialogues.dialogue_en: You know this business logic best. Write this part for me - you'll do it better than I can.

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，我今晚约了相亲，剩下的PPT你帮我收个尾？
dialogues.dialogue_en: I've got a blind date tonight. Can you finish the rest of the PPT for me?

dialogues.dialogue: {playerName}，我实在搞不定这个软件，你就当教我帮我做了？
dialogues.dialogue_en: I seriously can't figure out this software. Just treat it like teaching me and do it for me?
